text:
Once upon a time in Pebbleborough, there lived a clumsy cat named Whiskers. He loved nothing more than sliding down hills. Every morning, he'd race down Featherhill Lane. But one day, his adventures got a bit too dangerous.

While chasing a tasty mouse, Whiskers slipped and fell into Mrs. Maple's vegetable patch. The carrots tore his fur! He slid all the way to Oakwood Grove where Mr. Hedgehog saw him, grunting and wiggling.

"Hazellops!" Mr. Hedgehog called. "Stay quiet."

Whiskers didn't listen. He scampered back home. Mom-cat purried him.

But then one evening, when shadows danced on the wall, he heard a soft giggle.

Creeping quietly, he peeked. There was Luna, the graceful moon owl! She laughed softly.

"You clumsy feathered friend," she whispered. "You've played enough slides today."

Whiskers blushed. He just wanted
